name: Paystack Transaction Verification
primary_area: Payments / Verification / Ash State / Oban / Idempotency
implementation_code_allowed: yes; transaction-verification-only implementation; no ticket issuance, attendee mutation, scanner sync, delivery, WhatsApp, refund, or Redis inventory mutation
existing_systems_forbidden_from_mutation: Scanner routes and scanner hot path
verification_required_checks: local PaymentAttempt exists for provider + provider_reference
Paystack API call succeeded and response contains data
provider environment/domain matches expected mode when available
forbidden_changes: Paystack HTTP call inside Ash resource actions
Direct Repo status updates bypassing named Ash actions
Payment verified from webhook payload only

Order: awaiting_payment -> paid_verified when all checks pass and active checkout preconditions hold
payment_pending -> paid_verified when all checks pass and active checkout preconditions hold
paid_unverified -> paid_verified when all checks pass and active checkout preconditions hold
terminal states remain terminal; VS-07C owns recovery/manual-review outcomes
CheckoutSession: payment_link_sent -> paid when all checks pass and session is eligible
payment_started -> paid when all checks pass and session is eligible
expired/released/manual_review unchanged; VS-07C owns late-payment recovery

red_requires_failure_when: Valid Paystack verification response does not move PaymentAttempt to verified_success
Provider status not success can mark Order paid_verified
Amount mismatch can mark Order paid_verified
Currency mismatch can mark Order paid_verified
Reference mismatch can mark Order paid_verified
Webhook payload alone can mark paid_verified
Expired checkout consumes inventory or issues ticket during verification
Duplicate worker creates duplicate transitions or downgrades verified state
Transient provider timeout permanently fails the payment
Operator/customer_session can trigger verification directly or read raw verify response
Logs include raw payload, raw verify response, secrets, access_code, authorization_url, phone, email, or tokens
Verification path mutates TicketIssue, Attendee, scanner/mobile sync, DeliveryAttempt, WhatsApp/Meta, refunds, or Redis inventory
green_requires: Provider success with matching status/reference/amount/currency marks PaymentAttempt verified_success
Active eligible Order and CheckoutSession move to paid_verified/paid through named actions
StateTransition rows are appended for all state changes
Mismatch/unmatched/expired cases are safe and do not deliver value
Raw verify responses are sanitized/restricted and never logged
Only system/worker path can perform verification transitions
No ticket, attendee, scanner, inventory, delivery, WhatsApp, or refund side effects exist

performance_and_scaling.hot_data: Oban uniqueness by payment_attempt_id/provider_reference; optional Redis verification dedupe only if existing repo convention uses it
performance_and_scaling.warm_data: Optional admin/order/payment status cache invalidation after paid_verified
performance_and_scaling.ttl_strategy: No inventory TTL changes; optional verification dedupe key sales:payments:paystack:verify:{provider_reference} TTL 1-24h only if repo already uses Redis dedupe
performance_and_scaling.cache_invalidation: No inventory cache invalidation; invalidate admin/order/payment dashboard cache on paid_verified if such cache exists
performance_and_scaling.pubsub: Internal admin/status broadcast only; no customer ticket/delivery PubSub

security_impact: Adds server-side payment verification, strict provider-result matching, raw verify response restrictions, and no-value-delivery-from-webhook-only safeguards.
next_slice: VS-07C Payment Failure and Mismatch Handling
